description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring elongated, lance-shaped green leaves with prominent yellow speckling and variegation. The leaves are arranged in a somewhat upright and slightly spreading manner, emerging from a central stem cluster. The plant is housed in a simple, cylindrical black plastic pot filled with dark brown soil. The pot has a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative elements. The overall appearance is clean and modern, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. The plant's foliage is lush and healthy, with a natural, slightly asymmetrical growth pattern.
description: A lush, upright potted plant with long, green, yellow-speckled leaves in a plain black cylindrical pot. The design is modern and minimal, suitable for urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plant's broadest leaf arrangement and the full cylindrical pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the narrow profile and the outward extension of the longest leaf.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the tallest central leaf and a more vertical leaf arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the spread of the lower leaves and the pot's round shape.
attribute_plant_species: Dieffenbachia (dumb cane) or similar variegated foliage plant
